---
title: "Publications"
---


## Published articles

::: {.card}
### Rare events of small-noise Doob conditioned processes

May 2026

Iago N. Mamede and Francesco Coghi

[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.24537)

:::
---


::: {.card}
### Universal features of nonequilibrium Ising models in contact with two thermal reservoirs

April 2026

Iago N. Mamede, Bart Cleuren and C.E. Fiore

[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.01926)


:::
---





::: {.card}
### Collective heat engines via different interactions: Minimal models, thermodynamics, and phase transitions

Iago N. Mamede, Vitória T. Henkes and C.E. Fiore

Phys. Rev. E 113, 054118 – Published 11 May, 2026

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1103/f371-6ck6) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2508.06438) 


:::
---

::: {.card}
### Steady-state heat engines driven by finite reservoirs

Iago N. Mamede, Saulo V. Moreira, Mark T. Mitchison and C.E. Fiore

Phys. Rev. E 113, 014115 – Published 13 January, 2026

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1103/hwj9-q7hf) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2505.05174) 


:::
---

::: {.card}
### Exact Mapping of Nonequilibrium to Equilibrium Phase Transitions for Systems in Contact with Two Thermal Baths

Iago N. Mamede, Carlos E. Fiore, Gustavo A. L. Forão, Karel Proesmans, André P. Vieira

[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2511.02127) 


:::
---


::: {.card}
### Work statistics at first-passage times   
Iago N Mamede, Prashant Singh, Arnab Pal, C.E. Fiore and Karel Proesmans

New Journal of Physics, Volume 26, March 2024

[DOI](10.1088/1367-2630/ad313d) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.12583) 


:::
---



::: {.card}
### Thermodynamics of interacting systems: The role of the topology and collective effects   
Iago Mamede, Karel Proesmans and C.E. Fiore  

Phys. Rev. Research 5, 043278 – Published 22 December, 2023

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevResearch.5.043278) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2308.02255) 

:::
---


::: {.card}
### Obtaining efficient collisional engines via velocity-dependent drivings   
Iago Mamede, Angel L. L. Stable and C.E. Fiore 

Phys. Rev. E 106, 064125 – Published 19 December, 2022

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevE.106.064125) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2209.01132) 

:::
---



::: {.card}
### Obtaining efficient thermal engines from interacting Brownian particles under time-periodic drivings   
Iago Mamede, Pedro E. Harunari, Bruno A. N. Akasaki, Karel Proesmans and C.E. Fiore  
Phys. Rev. E 105, 024106 – Published 4 February, 2022

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevE.105.024106) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2110.09235) 

:::


## Msc Thesis

::: {.card}
### Termodinâmica estocástica de máquinas coletivas e tempos de primeira passagem

Iago Nascimento Mamede

[PDF](https://teses.usp.br/teses/disponiveis/43/43134/tde-27022025-114143/publico/Tese_Iago_Versao_Final_Alterado.pdf)
:::
